praṇayavat a.
1 Loving, fond, affectionate;  R. 10. 57. 
2 Candid, frank.
3 Earnestly desirous of, longing for; jātaḥ sakhe praṇayavānmṛgatṛṣṇikāyāṃ  Ś. 6. 16.
